name: AtCoder toolkit (online-judge-tools + atcoder-cli)
description: Installs online-judge-tools (oj) and atcoder-cli (acc) for competitive programming on AtCoder. Optionally applies the unmerged upstream fix (online-judge-tools/api-client#173) for AtCoder's KB/MB -> KiB/MiB memory-notation change.

ojVersion.description: online-judge-tools version to install from PyPI ('latest' for the newest release).

apiClientVersion.description: online-judge-api-client version to install from PyPI ('latest' for the newest release).

accVersion.description: atcoder-cli version to install from npm ('latest' for the newest release).

applyAtcoderMemoryPatch.description: Apply the unmerged fix from online-judge-tools/api-client#173 (AtCoder changed memory notation from KB/MB to KiB/MiB). Disable once the fix is merged upstream and included in the pinned apiClientVersion.

installSessionHelper.description: Install the 'set-atcoder-session' command, which writes a browser-copied REVEL_SESSION cookie into both oj and acc session stores (AtCoder's Cloudflare check breaks in-container 'oj login' / 'acc login').
